---
title: "In-Progress Tutorials"
subtitle: "Unvalidated tutorials awaiting review"
---

## Overview

These tutorials have not yet been validated. They may contain errors, incomplete code, or broken dependencies.

**Primary Example:** Tutorials use the Lotka-Volterra 3-species ODE system as a running example, demonstrating UQ methods on a realistic ecological model.

## Tutorial Catalog

### Getting Started

| Tutorial | Description | Prerequisites |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| [UQ Problem Framing](uq_problem_framing.qmd) | Core concepts of uncertainty quantification | Setup |

### Forward UQ

| Tutorial | Description | Prerequisites |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| [Forward Model Definition](forward_model_definition.qmd) | Define and evaluate forward models | Setup |
| [Quantities of Interest](quantities_of_interest.qmd) | Extract meaningful outputs from models | Forward Model |

### Inverse Problems

| Tutorial | Description | Prerequisites |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| [Hamiltonian MCMC](hamiltonian_mcmc.qmd) | Advanced MCMC sampling | Bayesian Calibration |

### FunctionTrain

| Tutorial | Description | Prerequisites |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| [FunctionTrain PCE](functiontrain_pce.qmd) | FT-based polynomial chaos | FT Intro |
| [FunctionTrain Moments (Math)](functiontrain_moments_math.qmd) | Theory of moment computation | FT Intro |
| [FunctionTrain Moments](functiontrain_moments.qmd) | Computing moments with FT | FT Moments Math |

### Multifidelity

| Tutorial | Description | Prerequisites |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| [Multioutput Statistics](multioutput_statistics.qmd) | Statistics for vector QoIs | MC Basics |
| [Multioutput Statistics Usage](multioutput_statistics_usage.qmd) | Using multioutput statistics | Multioutput Statistics |
| [PACV Estimators](pacv_estimators.qmd) | Parameterized ACV | ACV Framework |
| [PACV Recursion Analysis](pacv_recursion_analysis.qmd) | Recursive PACV analysis | PACV |

### Multi-Fidelity Surrogates

| Tutorial | Description | Prerequisites |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| [Multi-Fidelity Networks](mfnet_concept.qmd) | DAG-based multi-fidelity surrogates: concept and theory | Polynomial Chaos |
| [Multi-Fidelity Networks: Usage](mfnet_usage.qmd) | Build, fit, and evaluate MFNets with the PyApprox API | MFNet Concept |

### GP Statistics

| Tutorial | Description | Prerequisites |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| [GP Marginalization](gp_marginalization.qmd) | Reducing multi-dimensional GPs to 1D functions | GP Surrogates |
| [GP Mean with Uncertain Inputs](gp_mean_uncertain_inputs.qmd) | Computing GP mean/variance over uncertain inputs | GP Surrogates |
| [GP Mean of Variance](gp_mean_of_variance.qmd) | Expected variance of GP predictions | GP Surrogates |
| [GP Variance of Variance](gp_variance_of_variance.qmd) | Higher-order GP statistics (Isserlis' theorem) | GP Surrogates |
| [GP Separable Kernel Integrals](gp_separable_kernel_integrals.qmd) | Efficient 1D building blocks for GP statistics | GP Surrogates |
| [GP Statistics Workflow](gp_statistics_workflow.qmd) | End-to-end GP statistics workflow | GP Surrogates |
| [GP Sobol Uncertainty](gp_sobol_uncertainty.qmd) | Uncertainty in GP Sobol indices | GP Sensitivity |

### Advanced Topics

| Tutorial | Description | Prerequisites |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| [Optimal Experimental Design](optimal_experimental_design.qmd) | Information-theoretic design | GP Surrogates |
| [Optimization Under Uncertainty](optimization_under_uncertainty.qmd) | Risk-aware optimization | MC Basics |
| [Backend Alternatives](backend_alternatives.qmd) | Using PyTorch backend | Setup |
| [Benchmark Setup](benchmark_setup.qmd) | Creating custom UQ benchmarks | Forward Model |
| [ODE Integration](ode_integration.qmd) | ODE integration infrastructure | Forward Model |
| [Beam Model Introduction](beam_model_introduction.qmd) | Cantilever beam model running example | Setup |
